content.en:
"It's a pity that it's still unclear whether the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan has god-level spatial talent, and it's hard for me to see those powerful Purple Crystal Spirit Clan. "

Ye Tian said helplessly.

He also looked at information about the time talent, but the time talent was rarer than the space talent.

Only certain creatures have the talent for time, and those creatures are so rare that they are hard to find.

The Ethereal Fish is one of them, but the time talent of the Ethereal Fish is average, and what Ye Tian needs is a time talent above the pseudo-mystical level.

Therefore, he could only give up the talent of copying time for the time being.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to cultivate for a few more years, and then find a way to go out to find a spatial talent.

But on this day, an opportunity came.

The Supreme Hall of the Terran Race sent a notice to Ye Tian, which roughly told Ye Tian to carry out special cultivation for him and not to cultivate with other highnesses in the yellow-level region.

After all, the strength of the other highnesses in the yellow-level region was too weak, and the ten-year cultivation plan formulated by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race was suitable for other highnesses, but it was not suitable for Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian and other highnesses were cultivated together, it would definitely delay Ye Tian's cultivation process.

Therefore, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race decided to separate Ye Tian for cultivation through deliberation.

However, the specific cultivation method has not been completely decided, and now Ye Tian can put forward some requirements to apply for special cultivation in a certain aspect.

Of course, Ye Tian's requirements couldn't be too excessive, and they couldn't go beyond the cultivation scope of the Terran Supreme Palace.

Therefore, Ye Tian could try his best to make a request, but whether or not he could approve the application in the end would need to be decided after deliberation by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Seeing this notice, Ye Tian was very excited.

Immediately, he sent an application to the Terran Supreme Temple.

Ye Tian only had one application, he wanted to enter the headquarters of the Crystal Spirit Clan to ask the Crystal Spirit Clan's spatial talent powerhouse about the cultivation of space, and he wanted the Crystal Spirit Clan's space origin artifact to cultivate for a period of time.

In fact, this is just an excuse, his real purpose is to enter the headquarters of the Crystal Spirit Clan and see if there are any god-level spatial talents!

After making this application, Ye Tian waited quietly.

He didn't know if this application could be approved, if he could pass it, maybe he would really be able to replicate the god-level space talent this time.

Little by little, time passed.

Five days later.

A town hall envoy came, but it was not the god lord of the Tai platform, but another town hall envoy - the god lord of the sun!

"I've seen the Sun Dawn Divine Lord!"

Ye Tian said very politely.

The Sun Yao Divine Lord also smiled and said, "Your Highness Wanfa doesn't need to be polite, this time I came to you about your last application. "

"Didn't the top of the Terran Supreme Hall agree?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Yes, you did agree, you should want to raise your spatial talent to the god level, right?" asked the Sun Yao Divine Lord.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded and admitted.

He has an arcane-level spatial talent, and he applied to ask the Crystal Spirit Clan's spatial talent powerhouse to ask for spatial talent cultivation, and anyone can guess this purpose.

But the others definitely didn't know that he wanted to use the Copying Talent to copy a more advanced spatial talent.

At this time, the Sun Yao Divine Lord suddenly said something that shocked Ye Tian very much.

"Actually, there is a supreme in our human race who has god-level talent, but that supreme has been in retreat for a long time, and with your status, you can't invite a supreme to teach you, so for you at present, it may be helpful to enter the crystal spirit clan to learn the knowledge of spatial talent. It is said that the two supreme talents of space talent and time talent are different from other talents, the limit of these two supreme talents is not the god level, and there are other ways to improve to the god level talent level, but I am not a space talent, so I can't tell you. The Sun Divine Lord said.

"There are god-level spatial talents among the Supremes?"

Ye Tian thought to himself, if he saw that Supreme, he would immediately be able to use the god-level spatial talent, but how noble the Supreme was his identity, he was not qualified to see a Supreme, let alone disturb the retreat of a Supreme.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked curiously: "Sun Yao Divine Lord, do you know if the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan has a god-level spatial talent, if they have not given birth to a god-level spatial talent, if I want to raise the spatial talent to the god-level level, it is estimated that it will be difficult, and it is estimated that it will be difficult for them to help me!"

He was talking in a cliché, but the Sun Yao Divine Lord didn't know, but replied truthfully: "Actually, I don't know, after all, the Crystal Spirit Race is just a vassal race of our Terran race, and there are many vassal races of the Terran race, who would pay attention to the situation of a vassal race, but it is recorded in history that the Crystal Spirit Clan has given birth to god-level space talents, and there is more than one." "

"Sun Yao Divine Lord, when can I go to the Crystal Spirit Clan?"

Ye Tian asked.

"In a month, the Supreme Hall of the Terran needs to communicate with the high-level of the Crystal Spirit Clan, but don't worry, the Crystal Spirit Clan, as a vassal race, will not dare to resist our Terran Race, and will definitely agree. But don't expect the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan to guide you wholeheartedly, it's more likely to perfunctory you, as for whether you can get benefits from the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan, it depends on your ability. In addition, although the Crystal Spirit Clan is a vassal race of the Terran Race, it will definitely not accept the rule of the Terran Race, if you go to the Crystal Spirit Clan, it is estimated that there will be a young generation of geniuses of the Crystal Spirit Clan who will challenge you, with your strength, you are not afraid, but you can't be careless, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Sun Yao Divine Lord then left, and Ye Tian used the remaining month to continue cultivating the Chaos Body Refining Technique.

It's a pity that the accumulation of the fourth layer of the Chaos Refining Body Technique is too slow, and Ye Tian doesn't know when he will cultivate to the peak of the fourth layer, only when he has cultivated to the peak of the fourth layer can he apply to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate and impact the fifth layer of the Chaos Refining Body Technique, that is, the Chaos Refining Body Technique Dacheng Realm.

However, as long as you continue to cultivate, sooner or later you will be able to cultivate the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the peak of the fourth layer, and then impact the fifth layer realm.

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!

The Sun Yao Divine Lord came to Ye Tian again.

He came to take Ye Tian to the Crystal Spirit Clan, after all, this time he was not going to an ordinary place, and the vassal race Crystal Spirit Clan, naturally he had to send a cosmic god to save face a little.

Otherwise, only Ye Tian and his guards would go to the Crystal Spirit Clan, and they would undoubtedly look down on the Crystal Spirit Clan, in that case, the impact would not be good.

What's more, the area where the Crystal Spirit Clan is located is not a human star field, and an Ancient-level Highness enters there for fear of assassination by other alien races.

Therefore, it would be much safer to have a cosmic god to lead the way.

The Sun Yao God Lord left the Terran Supreme Hall with Ye Tian, and then took the Sun Yao God Lord's eight-star spaceship, and did not even take the teleportation stone gate, and left the Terran area in three days.

On the fourth day, the Divine Dawn's spaceship arrived in a strange star field.

Then.

The Sun Yao Divine Lord introduced Ye Tian: "Your Highness Wanfa, the population of the Jingling Clan is not large, there is only about one population of the river system. They live in the Crystal Spirit River system of the Bata Star Field. The Bata Star Domain does not belong to the Terran race, but a relatively chaotic star field, where there are many races, but they are basically small races. Since the Crystal Spirit Clan had taken refuge in the Terrans, no race dared to bully them. However, don't underestimate the Crystal Spirit Clan, although the Crystal Spirit Clan has a small population and occupies a small area, there are many beings in the Crystal Spirit Clan that are stronger than me. "

"Is the Crystal Spirit Clan so strong?"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

In just one river system, many cosmic gods have been born, and the human domain is not so powerful!

There are thousands of river systems in the area, but only a few cosmic gods have been born, and the Crystal Spirit Race can give birth to so many cosmic gods, which shows the strength of this race.

However, the disk domain is a relatively weak domain of human beings, and it is on the edge of the universe, with scarce resources and broken inheritance, so it naturally cannot be compared.

If it was compared to the powerful star field of the human race, the Crystal Spirit Clan was nothing.

Soon.

The Crystal Spirit River has arrived!

As soon as he entered the Crystal Spirit River System, a powerful aura enveloped the spaceship of the Sun Divine Lord.

"Your Highness Wanfa, the Crystal Spirit River System does not allow spaceships to enter, let's go out!"

The Sun Divine Lord said.

Whew!!

Ye Tian, Jin Chen Zhenjun and other guards flew out one after another, and the Sun Yao Divine Lord also waved his hand and put away his spaceship.

With the strength of the Sun Yao God Lord Cosmic God, he could instantly take Ye Tian through the layers of blockades and directly descend on the headquarters continent of the Crystal Spirit Clan, but this was undoubtedly a bit disrespectful.

Although the Crystal Spirit Clan is a vassal of the Human Race, it is not a slave, if a Supreme Beings come, what do they want to do, the Crystal Spirit Clan will definitely not dare to be dissatisfied.

But the Sun God Lord is just a cosmic god, not enough to ignore all the rules.

In the blink of an eye.

One of the Crystal Spirit Clan's galaxy-level powerhouses descended in front of Ye Tian and the others.

As soon as these Crystal Spirit Clan star-level powerhouses saw Ye Tian and the others, they knew that Ye Tian and the others were Terrans, and they immediately didn't dare to make a mistake.

Of course.

Their eyes were mainly focused on the Sun Divine Lord, and they knew that the Sun Divine Lord was a cosmic god of the human race, and this status was very noble.

"Respected Terran powerhouse, what do you call it?"

Several star-level powerhouses of the Crystal Spirit Clan said very respectfully.

"I am the Sun Yao God Lord of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, this is His Royal Highness Wanfa, the Emperor of the Supreme Hall of our Human Race, His Royal Highness Wanfa, according to the agreement with the high-level of the Crystal Spirit Clan, come to the Crystal Spirit Clan to study, you go and inform the high-level of the Crystal Spirit Clan, you will know!"

The Sun Yao Divine Lord said lightly.

"We're going to let the top brass know!"

A galaxy-level powerhouse left and went to inform the higher-level leaders, but the other galaxy-level powerhouses did not let Ye Tian and the others enter the Jingling River system.

After all, without confirmation, the Terran powerhouses could not enter the Jingling River System at will.
